title: Galangal Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with galangal, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is light and refreshing, with a hint of spice from the galangal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced galangal and cook for another 2 minutes, until fragrant.
Stir in the stir-fry sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
